name: FIFA Legend Mode
description: Summon your football legend's aura — pick Ronaldo, Messi, Neymar, Ochoa or Pulisic and put your face into an epic cinematic FIFA poster with AI identity preservation

default_prompts.image_edit_ronaldo_male:
Use the uploaded face image as the EXACT identity reference with extremely strong face preservation and realistic facial integration. The fan boy's face identity must remain exactly accurate, fully recognizable, and completely preserved throughout the entire image. The fan boy's face must remain fully separate and untouched — do NOT blend, morph, or combine the user's face with Cristiano Ronaldo. Maintain the exact facial structure, beard, hairstyle, eyes, smile, skin texture, and natural identity from the uploaded image with ultra realistic accuracy.

The fan boy face must look completely real and naturally photographed — avoid over-sharpened skin, overexposed highlights, plastic AI skin texture, artificial glow, or fake AI-generated facial appearance. Keep realistic pores, natural beard texture, authentic shadows, balanced skin tones, natural lighting, and professional sports photography realism.

Create a realistic body that naturally matches the uploaded face with believable anatomy, shoulders, neck proportions, posture, and realistic human movement. The fan boy should look genuinely happy, emotional, and proud with a natural cinematic smile and authentic football fan emotion. Only a realistic premium Portugal national team jersey worn naturally with ultra detailed high-quality fabric texture, premium realistic shine, luxury reflective sports material, hyper detailed stitching, embossed fabric patterns, realistic jersey depth, cinematic glossy reflections, vibrant Portugal colors, premium FIFA-quality football jersey appearance, premium 3D jersey realism, realistic cloth physics, authentic folds, sharp logo detailing, professional sportswear texture quality — no extra jersey, towel, scarf, or flag.

The fan boy is standing alone on the football ground in a half-body cinematic view with a dynamic but natural celebration action. The action should feel emotional and stylish, like reacting to a legendary football moment — subtle cheering movement, looking upward slightly, natural arm motion, relaxed but powerful fan energy, realistic sports photography feel. The pose should look authentic, emotional, energetic, dynamic, and professionally captured with visible body movement and strong fan emotion, not aggressive or overacted.

The fan boy expression must look highly emotional, passionately excited, and naturally joyful like witnessing a historic football moment. The smile should feel authentic and energetic, with realistic cheering emotion and visible fan excitement. The dynamic action must remain clearly visible with natural celebratory movement, subtle body motion, lifted shoulders, expressive posture, strong football fan energy, realistic motion feeling, and cinematic celebration realism while still looking realistic and cinematic.

Behind and above the user appears a gigantic translucent ghost-like aura figure of Cristiano Ronaldo floating in the sky like a legendary spiritual football guardian. Cristiano Ronaldo must remain completely separate from the fan boy and dominate the upper background with enormous divine presence, glowing intense red flame aura, red-white smoke aura, volumetric fog, floating particles, lightning-like energy streaks, soft cinematic light rays, mythical football energy, fiery red spiritual energy, glowing ember particles, premium aura lighting, and powerful legendary football god atmosphere. The aura should feel majestic, premium, emotional, and cinematic rather than aggressive.

Add a gigantic glowing red flame English text saying "LEGACY" behind the fan boy integrated into the aura atmosphere. The text should be extremely large, cinematic, premium, and partially hidden behind the fan boy's body for realistic depth. Some letters should naturally disappear behind the fan boy while other parts glow around him. The text must look formed from realistic red fire, glowing ember particles, smoke energy, luminous aura effects, premium 3D flame texture, cinematic fire glow, and powerful spiritual energy, blending naturally with the Cristiano Ronaldo spiritual atmosphere and stadium lighting. The glowing text should feel like part of a premium football poster design, adding epic cinematic energy without overpowering the fan boy's face.

Remove all nearby people around the fan boy on the ground. The user should stand alone clearly in the foreground. Only distant crowd members should appear far away in the stadium benches and stands, creating realistic stadium depth and atmosphere without distracting from the main subject.

Massive realistic Portugal football stadium at night with authentic floodlights, subtle rain mist, cinematic smoke, realistic stadium depth, natural perspective, and premium sports atmosphere. The final image must look like a real professionally edited football poster and high-end sports photography, not like an obvious AI-generated image. Ultra realistic textures, natural skin tones, realistic lighting balance, cinematic HDR grading, realistic shadows, natural depth of field, emotional World Cup atmosphere, premium FIFA poster aesthetic, centered wallpaper composition, masterpiece quality, ultra realistic 8K sports movie poster style with powerful legendary aura throughout the scene.
